👤 Owner: NirvanaOn

📝 Repository: NirvanaOn/SpotifyC2

📄 Descrizione: SpotifyC2 is a cybersecurity research project that demonstrates cloud-based command communication using Spotify playlists for command retrieval and Telegram for output delivery, without requiring the Spotify Web API.

item.description:
👤 Owner: xec412

📝 Repository: xec412/XeraLdr

📄 Descrizione: A stealthy and modular Windows loader designed to bypass modern EDR solutions using Module Stomping, Stack Duplication, and Advanced Sleep Obfuscation.

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: edr-evasion malware-development module-stomping proxyapi red-team shellcode-loader sleep-obfuscation stealth-loader win32api zilean

👤 Owner: DjVul

📝 Repository: DjVul/Extended-Kalman-Filter---STM32

item.description:
👤 Owner: bluechips-zhao

📝 Repository: bluechips-zhao/av-evasion-skills

📄 Descrizione: AI AV Evasion Skill v4.0 是一套完整的 Shellcode 免杀方案，采用模块践踏（Module Stomping）、IPv4 混淆、XOR 加密、HeapAlloc 缓冲以及纤程（Fiber）执行等技术，从静态和行为两个层面绕过主流杀软和 EDR

⭐ Stelle: 34

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: No license

item.title: 📝 SansNope/UnleashedRecomp-Android (31 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: SansNope

📝 Repository: SansNope/UnleashedRecomp-Android

📄 Descrizione: The port was created using Anthropic's Fable 5 AI model. It works EXCLUSIVELY on Adreno GPUs. A port for devices with Mali family GPUs is not planned. I don't understand the technical side myself; I just guided Fable 5 in the right direction, mixed the models, and performed the debugging. Artifacts, freezing, and audio issues are possible.

⭐ Stelle: 31

🍴 Forks: 3

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-04T06:44:05Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-10T04:54:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 TOTO-sys28/FetC (12 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: TOTO-sys28

📝 Repository: TOTO-sys28/FetC

📄 Descrizione: FetC is a lightweight HTTP/HTTPS download library and command-line downloader written in C. It focuses on simplicity, portability, and a clean codebase while supporting modern HTTP features such as resumable downloads, chunked transfer decoding, redirects, and multithreaded segmented downloads.

⭐ Stelle: 12

🍴 Forks: 2

📜 Licenza: MIT License
